name: MINNEHAHA COUNTY JAIL-- SUMMIT FOOD SVC

violations.description: SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Cups articles noted being reused. Syrofoam cups being used to dispense dry seasonings.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization. After multiple cycles observed sanitizing temperatures at 156?F.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor tiles in the food prep area and near dish washing area are in need of repair.
